perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair in a black top stands in front of frozen food shelves at Costco, holding a box of Yummy Tale Shrimp Fritters and gesturing towards it. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting where the same woman is joined by another woman wearing a zebra-patterned bucket hat and an apron; they sit at a table with a plate of fried shrimp and a small white bowl of red dipping sauce. (3) The women take turns dipping individual shrimp into the sauce, showing the interior of the fried shrimp to the camera, and eating while making various facial expressions reflecting their evaluation of the taste.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic background music starts immediately; a female voice speaks enthusiastically, detailing the product's name, weight, and price. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as two female voices engage in a dialogue, discussing the convenience of using an air fryer and the specific ingredients like honey. (3) The tone remains conversational and humorous, with audible sounds of the women reacting to the taste and texture, particularly focusing on the ratio of batter to shrimp.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '908公克599元' (908g 599 NTD) and '泰國蝦哦' (Thailand shrimp) appearing as price/product info. (2) Decorative Text: '超酥脆' (Super crispy) with a blue background, '你看蜂蜜' (Look at the honey) emphasizing a specific ingredient, and '我的蝦子在哪裡?' (Where is my shrimp?) highlighting a humorous critique. (3) Subtitles translate the spoken Mandarin dialogue throughout the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Store Introduction -> Product Detail Close-up -> Home Tasting and Critique

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators reviewing the food.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a black top; the other wears a black and white zebra-pattern bucket hat and a beige apron over a gray shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene shows commercial freezer aisles with various frozen seafood products; second scene is a domestic interior with a dining table, light-colored walls, and some household items in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video provides a detailed consumer review of Costco's 'Honey & Spicy Shrimp Fritters'. It emphasizes the product's price and convenience while offering a critical assessment of the food's quality, specifically noting that while the flavor and sauce are good, the batter is thick relative to the size of the shrimp.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of the product box, price callouts, and a dedicated tasting session.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: On-location store intro followed by home tasting session with a duo dynamic.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The review maintains a balance of promoting a product found at a major retailer while maintaining an 'authentic' influencer voice by pointing out perceived flaws (thick batter).
